run.task: Check HubSpot for open deals where the last contact was 3, 7, or 14 days ago. For each, look at the contact's recent inbox activity to make sure they haven't already replied. Draft a personalized follow-up email per deal — referencing what was discussed last and matching the urgency to where the deal sits in the pipeline. Send all drafts in one digest email to the user, ranked by which leads are most worth chasing (recent activity + deal stage). Don't send anything to prospects directly.

patch.failure_summary: Run stopped — Couldn't search inbox threads — the connected account isn't authorized to do this. Please reconnect it and grant the requested access.
